case_title: ALICE KWONG VS. FUJIIRYOKI USA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (W.SHEN CEO) FILED BY DEFENDANT ACIGI RELAXATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FUJIIRYOKI USA ACIGI RELAXATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 - SERVED JAN-08-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ACIGI RELAXATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-07-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 - SERVED JAN-08-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FUJIIRYOKI USA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-30-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT AGREES TO REPAIR THE CHAIR FOR A $300 + CHARGE= $150 FOR INSPECTION FEE AND $150 FOR LABOR CHARGE--NO CHARGE FOR PARTS. NO CHARGE TO DELIVER THE CHAIR BACK TO PLAINTIFFS", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY NOELLE SCHILLER--ASSISTANT TO OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY KWONG, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT FUJIIRYOKI USA ACIGI RELAXATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ACIGI RELAXATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-11-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED -
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
